name: app-academia
description: Responsive HTML workout plan with animated exercise GIFs.

scripts.build:web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html www/index.html && cp -R gifs www/gifs
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
